description_long: This is a freestanding bulletin board with a wooden frame and a green chalkboard surface, supported by four legs with caster wheels for mobility. The front side features pinned papers, including hand-drawn diagrams and notes, attached with colored push pins. The frame is slightly curved, giving it a modern and dynamic appearance, and the wood has a polished finish. The back side is plain, showing only the green chalkboard surface without any attachments. The board is large enough to be used for public notices or educational purposes and is designed to be easily moved within indoor environments. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for high-traffic areas.
description: A large, freestanding wooden-framed bulletin board with a green chalkboard surface, caster wheels, and pinned papers on the front. The design is modern, mobile, and suitable for public or educational spaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the green chalkboard surface with several pinned papers and colored push pins, framed by a curved wooden structure on caster wheels.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the board, the depth of the wooden frame, and the positioning of the caster wheels.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain green chalkboard surface without any papers or pins, highlighting the full wooden frame and support structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the slim profile and the alignment of the frame and wheels, mirroring the other side.
attribute_frame_design: Curved rectangular wooden frame, medium thickness, with four caster wheels for mobility and metal brackets at the joints.
